title: Drag to reorder groups in a Kanban view (or just mirror the order in the Main table)
excerpt: I would like to drag to reorder groups within a Kanban view. I think they should reflect the order of groups in the Main Table. The ordering of groups changes as projects shift in priority. As it stands, on a Kanban view…

posts.author: jsararas (Jeff)
posts.cookedHtml: I would like to drag to reorder groups within a Kanban view. I think they should reflect the order of groups in the Main Table. The ordering of groups changes as projects shift in priority. As it stands, on a Kanban view, they are frozen in order of group creation.

posts.author: Daniel.prudente (DP)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @jsararas, the groups actually reflect the order in the main table, right!? So, when you regroup them in the main table, it will automatically (after two or three reloads…) reorder in the kanban view, no?
See my video just to be sure I understood what you said.

posts.author: jsararas (Jeff)
posts.cookedHtml: Hey @Daniel.prudente - I think someone on the team sneakily fixed/enhanced this behavior since I posted. Or else I had some cache gremlins that have since been eliminated. Mine works like yours now, and I appreciate you bringing my attention to it!
